subject: LU-6142 ldlm: Fix style issues for ldlm_lib.c

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

(5 comments)

5 style warning(s).
For more details please see http://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Coding_Style_Guidelines

Patch Set 1:

Code-wise looks good to me.

Patch Set 1:

(5 comments)

I would prefer that both your cleanup and James fix can proceed.  One option is to just wait until his patch lands and then rebase, but I think eventually there will be files that are often modified that still need the style fixed.

Alternately, if this patch can be fast-tracked, it could be landed before James' and he can resolve the conflicts, since that patch needs to be updated anyway.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

Give this +2 for now, since it is ready, while James' is not.  Otherwise, this patch could be modified to avoid the hunks that James is changing (within at least 3 lines of patch context).

commit.message:
LU-6142 ldlm: Fix style issues for ldlm_lib.c

This patch fixes issues reported by checkpatch for
file lustre/ldlm/ldlm_lib.c
